page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.14xlarge is a storage-focused virtual server instance belonging to the ecs.d1 family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 56 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, providing 56 dedicated vCPUs without hyperthreading.

This instance is equipped with 224.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per CPU core. A key characteristic of this hardware profile is its massive local storage capacity, consisting of 165,356 GB of local hard disk drive (HDD) storage. This large-capacity HDD configuration is bundled directly with the instance, making it suitable for applications requiring high-density, cost-effective local storage.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 17 Gbps. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, the instance does not include any GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the combination of dedicated compute resources, moderate memory density, and massive local HDD capacity, this server is designed for storage-intensive workloads such as large-scale data warehousing, distributed file systems, big data analytics, and cold data storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.14xlarge is a storage-focused virtual server instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 56 dedicated physical cores and 56 vCPUs, utilizing a KVM hypervisor. The hardware configuration includes 224.0 GB of system memory, offering a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. A defining feature of this instance is its bundled local storage, which provides 165,356 GB of HDD capacity. Additionally, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 17 Gbps and does not feature GPU acceleration. This resource profile is highly optimized for storage-heavy workloads, making it a cost-efficient choice for large-scale data warehousing, distributed file systems, MapReduce jobs, and big data processing where massive local storage capacity is prioritized over high-speed solid-state performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1.14xlarge is a storage-focused instance featuring 56 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 224 GB RAM, 17 Gbps network bandwidth, and 165,356 GB of bundled local HDD storage.

tagline: A dedicated compute instance featuring massive local HDD storage capacity and balanced memory for large-scale data processing and storage.

165,356 GB of bundled local HDD storage for high-capacity data requirements
224.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
